text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While doing the rounds after school, I<n>notice two
students chatting in a<n>corner of the rooftop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I didn't tell anyone l was coming, just<n>like you
asked. What's this important<n>thing you have to
tell me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Are you familiar with the<n>batting cages in
front of the station?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, of course. I go to those cages<n>all the time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then are you also aware that the<n>prize for
becoming the home run king<n>this month is a ball
signed by Yutaka?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, everyone's talking about it. All<n>the regulars
are gunning for that prize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then I have a request for you. I'd like<n>you to
teach me some strength<n>training techniques
that'll help me to<n>hit home runs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... You don't need any<n>strength
training, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What exactly do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, I'm currently the home<n>run king!
And I was gonna give you<n>the ball when the
rankings are<n>finalized!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...My deepest apologies, but I'm<n>afraid I cannot
accept the signed ball<n>from you, as kind an offer
as that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait... Why not, McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That ball is meant to reward one's<n>efforts. To
accept such a reward<n>without having made any
effort would<n>be inexcusable. An Umamusume of<n>
the Mejiro family could never.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The victory, the glory, the signed ball...<n>It is one's
own efforts that imbue<n>these things with value!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right. You're totally<n>right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We should battle each other to the<n>best of our
abilities, and leave with no<n>regrets... Now then, if
you'll excuse<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Continuing my rounds, I spot Mejiro<n>McQueen
again at the gym.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Right then, how shall I begin? Perhaps<n>with some
dumbbell exercises?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If it's dumbbells you're thinking of,<n>some
single-arm rows would be good.<n>They're great
for your lats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan... Why are you giving me<n>advice? Do you
not wish to defend<n>your position as the home run
king?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I don't plan on giving up my<n>home run
crown. I'm here to train,<n>y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just want to take you on after<n>you've trained
your glutes off! That's<n>why I'm gonna give you
all the<n>support I can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay McQueen, let's hit the weights<n>hard, get
ripped, and battle it out to see<n>who's the true
home run king!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Oh, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can think of nothing I'd enjoy more!<n>I shall
make you regret training me so<n>well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We're starting with five sets of thirty<n>single-arm
rows!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two Mejiros work up a huge<n>sweat pumping
iron until the curfew<n>forces them to return to their
dorms.
